rows.title: List of Changes for Laserfiche 8.1.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith List of Changes for Laserfiche 8.1. Product: Laserfiche 8.1, Audit Trail 8.1, Scanning 8.1 KB: 1012194 Published: May 11, 2009 Last Updated: May 11, 2009 Summary This article documents the list of changes for Laserfiche 8.1. More Information See the following list of changes for version 8.1. New Features Changes Fixes New Features for Laserfiche 8.1 Product New Feature Client The Document Viewer window now includes an annotation pane that lists all the annotations that have been applied to the document. Client The Document Viewer now supports polygon annotations. Client The Folder Browser window now includes the option to display a Preview Pane that allows you to view the contents of imaged documents without having to open the Document Viewer. Client There are now more options when positioning panes in the Folder Browser and Document Viewer. Client The E-Mail plug-in now supports sending a link to a document in addition to the original option of sending a copy of the document. Sending a link to a document will send a .lfe shortcut file that can be used to jump directly to the document in the repository. Client You can now view and manage the list of electronic documents that are considered open by the Laserfiche Client. Client The Folder Browser now supports a basic set of undo operations. For example, if you have moved, renamed, or cut or copied and pasted a document, you can undo to reverse that action. If the recycle bin is enabled, you can undo deleting a document, page or electronic file. Client The Document Viewer now includes an Electronic File pane that can display PDF files. Client You can now choose to retain the folder structure when exporting search results as a Laserfiche briefcase. Client You can now choose to include shortcuts when exporting a Laserfiche briefcase. Client You can create custom quick searches for the Quick Search box. Client You can now create new informational tags from within the Laserfiche Client. Client OCR now uses the OmniPage 16 engine. Client The OCR engine now generates word location information for multi-byte Asian languages. PhotoDocs Laserfiche PhotoDocs allows you to retrieve photos from a digital camera and view, process and store those photos in Laserfiche. Server Search Syntax Updates: {LF:parentname="Name"} returns entries with the specified parent folder. {LF:childname="Name"} returns the parent folder of the specified entry. {LF:lookin=EntryID} can now accept an entry ID instead of the path value. Server Copying and pasting a record folder now preserves the retention schedule, cutoff instruction, and review cycle. Server Expanded Recycle Bin Functionality: Can now store deleted pages and deleted electronic files. Can now delete template, field, and other metadata definitions even if they are assigned to entries in the Recycle Bin. Server The Laserfiche Server now supports Lightweight Directory Access Protocol (LDAP) authentication. Server When you change a volume's fixed path, Laserfiche now attempts to automatically move the volume files to the new fixed path. Laserfiche deletes the files in the old path when all the data is successfully copied to the new location. However, Laserfiche will not delete the folder structure in the old path. Server You can now encrypt and compress volume files. Encrypted volumes become read-only. Server You can now specify constraints in number fields. Server There is now an option to automatically compress rolled-over audit logs. Server There is now an option to lock a repository. Locking a repository prevents any user account without the Manage Connections privilege from connecting to the repository. Server Laserfiche now attempts to compresses HTTP responses to version 8.1 client programs in order to improve network efficiency. Server Performance improvements to: Importing and exporting briefcases Exporting and attaching volumes Browsing the folder tree when there are many sessions Browsing search results when there are many sessions Full text search Changes from Laserfiche 8.0.2 Product Change Client The Laserfiche Client now automatically prepends the record series code to the name for a record series when creating the record series. (45046) Client Typing the same character in a list field no longer moves to the next item in the list field with the same starting characters. Laserfiche now jumps to the exact value matching what you type. (44395) Server Moving an entry no longer requires the Delete Entry entry access right on the source parent folder. Laserfiche now also allows you to move an entry if you have the Modify Contents entry access right on the source parent folder. Server The progress indicator is now more accurate when copying entries, deleting entries, and migrating entries between volumes. Server Exported volumes no longer include version group information. Entries in a version group do not need to be in the same volume, and the exported information was incomplete. (45435) Ser

rows.title: Legacy Client Applications and Laserfiche Server 9.
rows.detailTitle: Legacy Client Applications and Laserfiche Server 9.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Sign in Legacy Client Applications and Laserfiche Server 9. Product: Laserfiche 9 KB: 1013057 Published: November 5, 2012 Last Updated: December 31, 2012 Summary This article lists general areas of compatibility issues as well as a listing of specific issues when using Laserfiche 6 or Laserfiche 7 client programs to connect to a Laserfiche 9 Server. Laserfiche Server 9.0 is compatible with the following legacy Laserfiche products. Compatibility does not mean full support for new features available in Laserfiche Server 9.0. Legacy clients are unaware of new functionality. Laserfiche Client 6.0 and later Import Agent 6.03 and later Integration Express HTE 7.0 Integrator's Toolkit 6.0 and later Quick Fields 7.1.2 and later Web Access 7.0 and later WebLink 6.16 and later Snapshot 6.04 and later More Information Laserfiche 8 client programs See the following list of specific issues: Tag and template filtering in Quick Fields 8.3.0''s Laserfiche Capture Engine did not properly support Laserfiche Server 9.0.0. This issue was resolved in Quick Fields 8.3.0 hotfix 1013102 and later or with Laserfiche Server 9.0.1 and later. (96879) Laserfiche 7 client programs You will encounter compatibility issues when using Laserfiche 7 client programs to access the following areas of a Laserfiche 9 repository. Access rights and privileges Auditing Creating a repository Annotations Locking See the following list of specific issues: You may receive an "[800] error" if your search result browser is configured to display a date type field and the search result includes a document with a date type independent field. (39847) A repository name with more than 46 characters may not automatically display in the list of available repositories on the Laserfiche Client 7 Start Page. You may need to click Attach and attach the repository. The repository will attach correctly and you will be able to log in to the repository. However, the Start Page may display the Laserfiche Server's name appended to the end of the repository name. Users with the Create Templates and Fields privilege cannot add a new template to repository during briefcase import. (37140) Protected annotations appear to be editable even if you are not the document owner or the creator of the protected annotation. However, attempting to save changes will return an "Access denied" message. You will not be able to save any other changes you have made to the document until you undo your changes to the protected annotation. (36921) Attempting to modify the text of a document stored on a permanent volume will return an "Error opening/creating a document page part volume file." error. (36267) The New Page menu item remains disabled in Laserfiche Client 7 if you are granted the Append Data entry access right. Laserfiche Client 7 expects you to have the Modify Contents right. This means that in order to add a new page through Laserfiche Client 7, you must have both Append Data and Modify Contents. (36265) When viewing entry access rights through Laserfiche Client 7, Modify Contents is mapped to two separate Laserfiche 9 entry access rights. It can mean that you have either the Delete Document Pages right or the Modify Contents right or both. (35948) If you attempt to modify entry access rights from Laserfiche Client 7, you must have the Read entry access right on the entry you wish to modify. (35930) The "use a read-only connection" check box on the Laserfiche Client 7 Start Page will not create a read-only connection. (35685) You may receive "permission denied" errors after adding a text page to a document and switching pages when you only have the Read and Append Data volume access rights. (35844) You cannot set entry access rights directly on Windows accounts through Laserfiche Client 7. You are able to view effective rights. (35347) Windows accounts configured to "Inherit authentication rights from group membership" will not be displayed in the Laserfiche 7 Administration Console's Windows Accounts node. (35337) The Create Shortcuts and Delete Shortcuts entry access rights no longer exist. However, when viewing effective rights through Laserfiche Client 7, the dialog will display you as having those rights. (35251) The Laserfiche 7 Administration Console will not display the correct effective rights for a trustee if you take advantage of the new groups within groups functionality of Laserfiche. (35216) Laserfiche Client 7 may not correctly handle the new token format. (35105) Laserfiche Client 7 is not directly aware of the Laserfiche Recycle Bin. However, if the Recycle Bin is enabled, deleting an entry using Laserfiche Client 7 still correctly moves the entry to the Recycle Bin. (34923) You cannot use Laserfiche Client 7 to independently assign either the Freeze entry access right or the Unfreeze entry access right. Due to the consolidation of Freeze and Unfreeze into one entry access right in Laserfiche, you must set both rights. (34815) If you have the Rea

rows.title: Known Issues with Web Access 7.2.1
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Known Issues with Web Access 7.2.1 Product: Web Access 7.2.1 KB: 1011666 Published: November 1, 2006 Last Updated: November 1, 2006 Summary This article documents the known issues with Web Access 7.2.1. Known Issues for Version 7.2.1 1000993 Internet Explorer May Become Unresponsive After Adding a Highlight or Stamp. (21232) 1000991 Pop-up Blockers Can Prevent Web Access From Properly Functioning. (15311) When repositories are removed from the Web Access Administrator's Utility, the allowed/disallowed access list is not removed. When the repository configuration entries are shifted due to the removal of an entry, the access list for the entry that was removed now applies to the entry that has been shifted to its place in the listing. (28096) Installing Laserfiche Scanning 7.2.1 over your existing installation of Laserfiche Scanning 7.1.x will prevent you from scanning from within Laserfiche client 7.1.x. You will need to upgrade the client to Laserfiche client 7.2.x The ActiveX version of the thumbnail control allows you to drag images from Windows Explorer into the thumbnail control. However, this functionality is not supported when Web Access is configured to use a port other than the standard HTTP port. (27144) The Web Access installation automatically loads the Web Access Administration Utility the first time you reboot after installing Laserfiche Web Access. Windows will not finish starting up until after you close the utility. (27079) When you select multiple items in the folder browser and right-click on an item, the available items in the resulting context menu is based on the right-clicked item, not on all of the multiple selected items. (26938) Folder and document names that contain leading spaces are not displayed with the leading spaces in the folder browser. This is only a display issue. When you try to rename the item, you will see the correct name with the leading blank spaces. (26926) Web Access may take a long time to open a document associated with a template that contains a large list field. Internet Explorer may appear frozen until the loading process finishes. (26862) When you create a new document from an existing document via the thumbnail drag and drop method, the new document will be assigned the same template as the original document. However, field information will not be automatically transferred. (26836) You cannot manually add text to an electronic document that does not already have text pages associated with it. You must first use the "Extract Text" feature to create text pages before you can manually add text to an electronic document. (26804) The thumbnail display of the document window does not automatically scroll when you are dragging and dropping thumbnails. (26668) Laserfiche Web Access is not supported on the Arabic release of Windows 2000. (26666) Selected search types are preserved when switching between the search window and the folder browser window. However, any search criteria specified within a search type is not preserved when you switch back to the folder browser window. (26658) Having a large number of templates can significantly increase loading times for any web page that contains a listing of the available templates. (26656) The Extended Properties feature right only prevents a user from adding the "ID" column to their folder browser window or search window. If a user has previously customized the folder browser window or search window to display the "ID" column, they will still be able to view the "ID" column after they are denied the Extended Properties feature right. (26533) Web Access does not support IIS 6.0 being configured as a web garden with more than one worker process. If IIS has such a configuration, you will be unable to log in. (26527) If ASP file caching is enabled, Web Access may be unable to display Arabic characters after an error occurs between Web Access and Internet Explorer. To prevent this issue, configure your Web Access virtual directory and disable ASP file caching. (26394) Web Access does not support extracting text from .msg files through an IFilter. (26091) When you use Web Access Snapshot to print a Microsoft Excel file, it will only print the first worksheet. (25852) Web Access Snapshot does not correctly use the default printer settings when printing a Microsoft Excel file. Instead, it uses the paper and resolution settings of the Excel file. (25851) The pop-up blocker included with Google Toolbar can interfere with the standard operation of Web Access. You should not use Google Toolbar with Web Access. (25846) Clicking the Check Out button on the Check Out Document dialog box loads a File Download dialog box. The selected electronic document is still considered checked out even if you cancel out of the File Download dialog box. (25656) Copying and pasting a document will fail silently if the user does not have sufficient volume access rights. For example, the copy & paste action will fail

rows.title: Legacy Client Applications and Laserfiche Server 8.
rows.detailTitle: Legacy Client Applications and Laserfiche Server 8.
rows.detailText: Product Support Learn Blake Smith Legacy Client Applications and Laserfiche Server 8. Product: Laserfiche Server - Team (MSDE) 8.0.0, Laserfiche Server - United (MS SQL) 8.0.0, Laserfiche Server - United (Oracle) 8.0.0 KB: 1011930 Published: March 31, 2008 Last Updated: March 31, 2008 Summary This article lists general areas of compatibility issues as well as a listing of specific issues when using Laserfiche 6 or Laserfiche 7 client programs to connect to a Laserfiche 8 Server. Laserfiche Server 8.0 is compatible with the following legacy Laserfiche products. Compatibility does not mean full support for new features available in Laserfiche Server 8.0. Legacy clients are unaware of new functionality. Laserfiche Client 6.0 and later Import Agent 6.03 and later Integration Express HTE 7.0 Integrator's Toolkit 6.0 and later Quick Fields 7.1.2 Web Access 7.0 and later WebLink 6.16 and later Snapshot 6.04 and later More Information Laserfiche 7 client programs You will encounter compatibility issues when using Laserfiche 7 client programs to access the following areas of a Laserfiche 8 repository. Access rights and privileges Auditing Creating a repository Annotations Locking See the following list of specific issues: You may receive an "[800] error" if your search result browser is configured to display a date type field and the search result includes a document with a date type independent field. (39847) A repository name with more than 46 characters may not automatically display in the list of available repositories on the Laserfiche Client 7 Start Page. You may need to click Attach and attach the repository. The repository will attach correctly and you will be able to log in to the repository. However, the Start Page may display the Laserfiche Server's name appended to the end of the repository name. Users with the Create Templates and Fields privilege cannot add a new template to repository during briefcase import. (37140) Protected annotations appear to be editable even if you are not the document owner or the creator of the protected annotation. However, attempting to save changes will return an "Access denied" message. You will not be able to save any other changes you have made to the document until you undo your changes to the protected annotation. (36921) Attempting to modify the text of a document stored on a permanent volume will return an "Error opening/creating a document page part volume file." error. (36267) The New Page menu item remains disabled in Laserfiche Client 7 if you are granted the Append Data entry access right. Laserfiche Client 7 expects you to have the Modify Contents right. This means that in order to add a new page through Laserfiche Client 7, you must have both Append Data and Modify Contents. Only Append Data is needed when using Laserfiche Client 8. (36265) When viewing entry access rights through Laserfiche Client 7, the Modify Contents is mapped to two separate Laserfiche 8 entry access rights. It can mean that you have either the Delete Document Pages right or the Modify Contents right or both. (35948) If you attempt to modify entry access rights from Laserfiche Client 7, you must have the Read entry access right on the entry you wish to modify. (35930) The "use a read-only connection" check box on the Laserfiche Client 7 Start Page will not create a read-only connection. (35685) You may receive "permission denied" errors after adding a text page to a document and switching pages when you only have the Read and Append Data volume access rights. (35844) You cannot set entry access rights directly on Windows accounts through Laserfiche Client 7. You are able to view effective rights. (35347) Windows accounts configured to "Inherit authentication rights from group membership" will not be displayed in the Laserfiche 7 Administration Console's Windows Accounts node. (35337) The Create Shortcuts and Delete Shortcuts entry access rights no longer exist. However, when viewing effective rights through Laserfiche Client 7, the dialog will display you as having those rights. (35251) The Laserfiche 7 Administration Console will not display the correct effective rights for a trustee if you take advantage of the new groups within groups functionality of Laserfiche 8. (35216) Laserfiche Client 7 may not correctly handle the new token format. (35105) Laserfiche Client 7 is not directly aware of the Laserfiche 8 Recycle Bin. However, if the Recycle Bin is enabled, deleting an entry using Laserfiche Client 7 still correctly moves the entry to the Recycle Bin. (34923) You cannot use Laserfiche Client 7 to independently assign either the Freeze entry access right or the Unfreeze entry access right. Due to the consolidation of Freeze and Unfreeze into one entry access right in Laserfiche 8, you must set both rights. (34815) If you have the Read Entry Access entry access right on an entry, it may appear that you can modify entry access rights from Laserfiche Client 7. However, if you do not als
